Bundled notification icons
==========================

This application bundles notification icons from Tabler Icons by Pawel Kuna.

Icons used:
- alert-triangle.svg
- alert-octagon.svg
- info-circle.svg

Sources:
- https://tabler.io/icons/icon/alert-triangle
- https://tabler.io/icons/icon/alert-octagon
- https://tabler.io/icons/icon/info-circle

License:
- MIT
- See LICENSE.txt in this folder
